fullOutput:
Host remote
Hostname home.scottrix.co.uk
Port 443
AddressFamily inet
User remote
BatchMode yes
IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
LocalForward 20022 localhost:20022
LocalForward 10022 localhost:22
LocalForward 10025 localhost:25
LocalForward 10993 localhost:993
LocalForward 10631 localhost:631
DynamicForward 28080 

Host home
Hostname localhost
Port 10022
User scott
IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519

Host opt
Hostname optima.fritz.box
Port 22
User scott
IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519

Host aur.archlinux.org
IdentityFile ~/.ssh/aur
User aur

Host *
Compression yes
ForwardX11 yes
ConnectTimeout 120
ServerAliveCountMax 3
ServerAliveInterval 120
